title: City Craft
description: This mod can make your cities beautiful!
body:
Mod Introduction

This is a mod running on fabric,and it can help players build a better city in Minecraft. Fabric API is REQUIRED.

Mod Vesion

This mod adds many kinds of lines and signs of the real life and some city decorations.

You can place them biside roads or near buildings.

Mod Vesion

Now the mod supports 1.16.x, 1.17.x, 1.18.x and 1.19.x. Forge is not supported by the mod recently.
